description: Sample ssl-checker.io API responses for testing Process SSL Result node without live credentials.

test_cases._description: Certificate is invalid. Expected: alertLevel=CRITICAL, needsAlert=true.
Certificate valid but expires in 5 days. Expected: alertLevel=CRITICAL, needsAlert=true.
Certificate valid but expires in 25 days. Expected: alertLevel=WARNING, needsAlert=true.
Certificate valid with 180 days remaining. Expected: alertLevel=OK, needsAlert=false.

excel_format_example.description: Expected column structure in the OneDrive Excel file
excel_format_example.note: Domain values must be plain domain names — no https://, no trailing slashes
